changelog: Package metadata update. Whitelist the plugin assembly so Jellyfin loads only PhysicalReleaseGuard.dll.
description: Automatically manages a 'Hidden' tag for movies based on TMDb physical release data.
name: Physical Release Guard
overview: Scans your movie library and adds or removes a 'Hidden' tag based on whether a physical release (Blu-ray, DVD, etc.) exists according to TMDb data. Movies without physical releases get tagged so you can filter them out of your library view.
